P&ID, structural, hybrid)

(transformers, instruments, etc.)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Azure Document Intelligence
────────────
Priority 1: Layout Analysis
✓ OCR extraction (95-99% accuracy)
✓ Table structure detection
✓ Key-value pairs (title blocks)
✓ Reading order preservation
✓ Bounding box coordinates
✓ Confidence scoring

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Extraction Fallback
────────────
Priority 2: MarkItDown OCR
Priority 3: PyMuPDF direct
→ Graceful degradation
→ Always gets content
